patterns.reusable_components: The project has well-designed reusable components in components/ui/ that follow consistent patterns
patterns.skeleton_pattern: Skeleton component has variants (text, circle, card, rect) and exports SkeletonText and SkeletonCard
patterns.empty_state_pattern: EmptyState accepts icon (ElementType), title, description, and optional action button
patterns.error_state_pattern: ErrorState accepts title, description, and optional retry button with onRetry callback
patterns.current_bad_pattern: Most pages use inline animate-pulse divs, custom empty messages, and inconsistent error handling

existing_implementations.description: Three reusable UI components exist but are severely underutilized

usage_stats.empty_state_usage: Only 3 files use EmptyState (conversations, mobile analytics, admin DLQ)
usage_stats.skeleton_exports_usage: SkeletonText and SkeletonCard are NEVER imported anywhere (0 files)
usage_stats.inline_loading_states: 48 files use inline animate-pulse divs instead of Skeleton component

scope.focus_pages: Prioritize main dashboard pages first (8-12 pages), then admin pages as needed
components_to_standardize: Empty states (replace custom empty messages with EmptyState)
Error states (replace custom error UI with ErrorState)
